svg.title: Sub-A: Box Shell — Engineering Drawing
svg.text: Sub-A: Box Shell — Pump Cartridge Tray
Open-Top, Open-Front Rectangular Box — Third-Angle Orthographic Projection
Material: PETG | All dimensions in mm | Internal corner fillets: 1.0 mm R (all junctions)

g.text: 2. Print orientation: open top up (Z+), no supports needed
4. All internal corner fillets: R1.0 mm
5. No external fillets on box shell
8. Envelope: 160 x 155 x 72 mm (W x D x H)
Interior floor (Z=3): Sub-C bosses, Sub-F channels (bond)
Rear wall int (Y=8.5): Sub-E guide posts (bond)
Rear wall ext (Y=0): Sub-D fitting bores (cut)
Side wall int: Sub-G linkage slots (cut), Sub-H lid snaps (bond)
